title: Indian High Commissioner Visit NIBSS - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption: L-R: The Indian High Commissioner to Nigeria - H.E. Ambassador Abhishek Singh and Managing Director/CEO, NIBSS - Premier Owioh at a courtesy visit to NIBSS Headquarters in Lagos on January 13, 2026.
html: Photo Caption: L-R: The Indian High Commissioner to Nigeria – H.E. Ambassador Abhishek Singh and Managing Director/CEO, NIBSS – Premier Owioh at a courtesy visit to NIBSS Headquarters in Lagos on January 13, 2026.
